_note: Awards & Accolades — grouped into tabs by awarding body. Each tab has a 'label' (tab name) and an 'items' array. An item may include: year, title, score (e.g. '85%' for QLASSIC), description, and optionally a 'icon' key (purely decorative).

tabs.label: ISO Certifications
tabs.intro: SQA Builders maintains internationally recognised ISO certifications covering quality, safety, and environmental management.

items.title: ISO 9001 — Quality Management System
items.description: Certified by [Certifying Body] for the provision of construction, project and design management services.

items.title: ISO 45001 — Occupational Health & Safety
items.description: Certified for the company's Occupational Health and Safety management system across all project sites.

items.title: ISO 14001 — Environmental Management
items.description: Certified for environmental management practices covering site operations and corporate offices.

tabs.label: QLASSIC
tabs.intro: QLASSIC (Quality Assessment System in Construction) is the Malaysian industry benchmark for workmanship quality — assessed independently by CIDB. The projects below reflect representative scores achieved by SQA Builders.

items.title: [Project Name — Industrial Development]
items.description: Large-span industrial facility delivered for a Japanese logistics operator.

items.title: [Project Name — Commercial Office]
items.description: Flagship automotive showroom and service centre.

items.title: [Project Name — Institutional]
items.description: School block expansion delivered in phased works.

tabs.label: SHASSIC
tabs.intro: SHASSIC (Safety and Health Assessment System in Construction) independently evaluates contractor safety management practices. SQA's SHASSIC performance reflects the firm's commitment to site safety and Assurance.

items.title: [Project Name — Industrial Warehouse]
items.description: SHASSIC Band A rating — reflecting strong safety culture and management systems.

items.title: [Project Name — Manufacturing Facility]
items.description: Consistent safety performance across all assessment areas.

tabs.label: Commendations & Testimonials
tabs.intro: Letters of commendation and client testimonials received from clients, consultants, and project stakeholders.

items.title: Letter of Commendation — Japanese Logistics Operator
items.description: Received in recognition of on-time delivery and quality workmanship on a regional distribution facility.

items.title: Testimonial — Premium Automotive Principal
items.description: Acknowledgement for successful delivery of brand-aligned flagship showroom.

items.title: Testimonial — Private Education Group
items.description: Appreciation for minimising operational disruption during phased school expansion.
